query: Microsoft annual revenue fiscal year 2025 revenue 10-K 2025
answer: Microsoft's fiscal year 2025 revenue was $290.3 billion. The 10-K report details financial performance and segment revenues. The annual report includes comprehensive financial statements and disclosures.

results.title: Annual Report for Fiscal Year Ending June 30, 2025 (Form ...
results.snippet: Microsoft Cloud revenue increased 23% to $168.9 billion. •. Microsoft 365 Commercial products and cloud services revenue increased 14% driven

results.title: Microsoft Corp (MSFT) 10-K Annual Report July 2025
results.snippet: # Microsoft Corp (MSFT) SEC Filing 10-K Annual Report for the fiscal year ending Monday, June 30, 2025. #### **View Microsoft Corp's 10-K Annual Report in its entirety.**. #### **View Microsoft Corp's 10-K Annual Report in its entirety.**. *Compare this 10-K Annual Report to its predecessor by reading our highlights to see what text and tables were ~~**removed**~~,   **added**    and   **changed**   by Microsoft Corp.*. *Microsoft Corp's Definitive Proxy Statement (Form DEF 14A) filed after their 2025 10-K Annual Report includes:*. Microsoft Corp provided additional information to their SEC Filing as exhibits. **Receive an e-mail as soon as a company files an Annual Report, Quarterly Report or has new 8-K corporate news**. **Export Annual and Quarterly Reports to Adobe Acrobat (PDF), Microsoft Word (DOCX), Excel (XLSX) and Comma-Delimited (CSV) files for offline viewing, annotations and analysis**. **Export Annual and Quarterly Reports to Adobe Acrobat (PDF), Microsoft Word (DOCX), Excel (XLSX) and Comma-Delimited (CSV) files for offline viewing, annotations and analysis**.

results.title: Segment Revenue and Operating Income - FY25 Q4 - Microsoft
results.snippet: | us-gaap:RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax msft:ProductivityAndBusinessProcessesMember | Productivity and Business Processes | **$ 120,810** | $ 106,820 | $ 94,151 |. | us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss msft:ProductivityAndBusinessProcessesMember | Productivity and Business Processes | **$ 69,773** | $ 59,661 | $ 50,074 |. | us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss msft:IntelligentCloudMember | Intelligent Cloud | **44,589** | 37,813 | 28,411 |. | us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss msft:MorePersonalComputingMember | More Personal Computing | **14,166** | 11,959 | 10,038 |. *IMPORTANT NOTICE TO USERS (summary only,  click here  for full text of notice)* All information is unaudited unless otherwise noted or accompanied by an audit opinion and is subject to the more comprehensive information contained in our SEC reports and filings. All information speaks as of the last fiscal quarter or year for which we have filed a Form 10-K or 10-Q, or for historical information the date or period expressly indicated in or with such information. Information contained in these documents is current as of the earnings date, and not restated for new accounting standards. #### Related Information.
